title: Survivor's Abilities
description: The mod adds some useful attributes to TFC for easier mod/modpack creation
body:
This is a lib mod adding some attributes to Terrafirmacraft. These attributes make it easier for mod/modpack makers to adjust a playthrough in Terrafirmacraft (TFC).

The attributes currently include:

* MAX_LOAD: determines how many heavy and very large things you can carry before getting overburdened.
* HUNGER_TOLERANCE: determines how fast your food exhaustion builds up. 0 works as usual TFC, 10.0 makes exhaustion never build up.
